allow: PowerShell($d = Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { "dotnet: " + \(dotnet --version\) + "  @ " + $d.Source } else { "DOTNET_NOT_FOUND_LOCAL" }; $w = Get-Command wix -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "wix: " + \(wix --version\) } else { "WIX_NOT_FOUND_LOCAL" })
